details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation. The agent successfully added json_path constraint support across all required layers: (1) IR layer integration—added json_path parameter to SglSamplingParams and SglGen with proper initialization; (2) Validation—json_path_utils.py includes validate_json_path() for syntax validation and json_path_to_schema() converting paths to JSON Schema; (3) Registration—properly integrated in base_grammar_backend.py via dispatch_json_path(), in grammar_manager.py with caching support, and in SamplingParams for mutual exclusion checks; (4) Pattern consistency—mirrors existing constraint handling for json_schema/regex/ebnf throughout all files; (5) User-facing API—json_path parameter added to gen() function with early validation; (6) Example usage and comprehensive test kit included. All requirements met with clean, well-documented code following established SGLang patterns.
